entries.organization: INRIA, Paris - Valeo anSWer - Sorbonne Université
entries.description: Designing and evaluating reinforcement learning systems for decision-making and motion planning in autonomous driving. Research focuses on scalable self-play training for multi-agent scenarios, trajectory optimization, and simulation-based evaluation. Work spans algorithm design, Python implementation, and benchmarking in realistic driving simulators.

Built and evaluated multimodal deep learning pipelines for traffic sign reconstruction, detection, and recognition within an autonomous driving perception stack. Designed and benchmarked state-of-the-art architectures for robust real-world performance.

entries.organization: LCP Laboratory (Laboratoire de Commande des Processus), Algiers
entries.description: Optimized pose estimation techniques using reinforcement learning and deep learning for single and multi-agent robotic systems. Implemented and validated algorithms on aerial (UAV) and mobile robots using ROS and Gazebo. Bridged control theory with modern deep RL methods.

entries.organization: Centre de Développement des Technologies Avancées (CDTA)
entries.description: Assembled and commissioned a Hexa-rotor drone platform. Gained hands-on experience with UAV hardware integration, embedded systems, and flight system bring-up.
